---
title: "Esri Business Analyst"
page-layout: article
---

# Esri Business Analyst

**Provider:** Esri

## Description

Web-based GIS and market analysis platform with demographic, consumer, employment, and location data. Supports spatial analysis, site selection, and market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Workforce & Career Data
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Workforce & Career Data

## Access notes

Requires an individual account. For more information and to request an account, visit: Online Mapping Resources: Esri Business Analyst Web Apps.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/onlinemapping/BA)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
